## What and why

Describe the change and the motivation. Link any related issue.

## Checklist

- [ ] `mvn clean package` passes (build + unit tests)
- [ ] The benchmark still detects **30/30 with 0 false positives**, or `expected.yml`
      is updated with the new ground truth
- [ ] New rules/cases are documented (`docs/rules.md`, READMEs)
- [ ] Commit messages explain *why*, not just *what*

## Notes

Anything reviewers should know (trade-offs, follow-ups, limitations).
